manual_weather_note: If internet is not available, enter temperature and humidity manually.
hero_subtitle: A cleaner dashboard for farmers with crop insights, irrigation guidance, fertilizer suggestions, and printable field reports.
login_side_title: Better yield planning for every season.
login_side_text: View crop predictions, irrigation advice, fertilizer guidance, and field-ready reports in one simple workspace designed for real farm use.
signup_side_badge: Build a simple digital farm record
signup_side_title: Start with a cleaner way to plan crops.
signup_side_text: Create your account to track predictions, compare past seasons, and keep water plus fertilizer recommendations ready whenever you need them.
feature_crop_text: Choose your crop and season to get tailored recommendations.
feature_water_text: Stage-wise water requirement helps farmers plan irrigation more confidently.
feature_report_text: Reports are easy to print and carry for field decisions.
feature_ready_text: Select crop and season quickly with language-friendly labels.
feature_records_text: Review past reports and compare expected yield visually.
dashboard_subtitle: Track yield prediction, irrigation requirement, and fertilizer planning in a dashboard built for field decisions.
predict_subtitle: Works with internet weather or manual offline weather input.
result_ready_subtitle: Water and fertilizer actions are ready for this crop.
result_empty_subtitle: Generate a prediction to view weather, irrigation, and fertilizer recommendations.
past_predictions_subtitle: Search previous predictions and print reports any time.
graph_subtitle: Quick view of how predicted yield changes across crops.
empty_result_title: Ready for your next crop plan
empty_result_text: Submit the form to view yield estimate, weather conditions, irrigation requirement, and fertilizer recommendations together.

water_recommendations.high_humidity: High humidity detected. Monitor fungal diseases.
water_recommendations.high_temperature: High temperature detected. Increase irrigation frequency slightly and avoid moisture stress.

fertilizer_recommendations.cereal_npk_split: Use a balanced NPK dose at sowing. Split nitrogen into 2 to 3 applications instead of one heavy dose.
fertilizer_recommendations.compost_before_sowing: Apply compost or farmyard manure before sowing to improve soil structure and moisture holding.
fertilizer_recommendations.pulses_low_nitrogen: Use low nitrogen and focus more on phosphorus at sowing to support root growth and nodulation.
fertilizer_recommendations.pulses_rhizobium: Seed treatment or bio-fertilizer with Rhizobium can improve pulse crop nutrient efficiency.
fertilizer_recommendations.oilseed_sulfur: Apply moderate nitrogen with phosphorus and sulfur for better flowering and oil formation.
fertilizer_recommendations.organic_manure_quality: Add well-decomposed organic manure before planting to improve soil fertility and seed quality.
fertilizer_recommendations.fiber_split_nitrogen: Apply nitrogen in split doses during early vegetative growth to support steady stem and canopy development.
fertilizer_recommendations.fiber_potash: Use potash along with basal fertilizer to improve plant strength and overall crop quality.
fertilizer_recommendations.commercial_small_doses: Feed the crop in smaller scheduled doses through the season instead of one-time heavy fertilizer application.
fertilizer_recommendations.commercial_organic_mix: Combine organic matter with chemical fertilizer to maintain long-season soil fertility and reduce nutrient loss.
fertilizer_recommendations.general_soil_test: Use soil-test-based fertilizer planning whenever possible and avoid excessive nitrogen in a single dose.
fertilizer_recommendations.general_compost: Include organic manure or compost to improve nutrient availability and water retention.
fertilizer_recommendations.kharif_rain_timing: Because this is a monsoon season crop, apply fertilizer after heavy rain events settle to reduce nutrient runoff.
fertilizer_recommendations.rabi_root_zone: For Rabi crops, place fertilizer close to the root zone and irrigate lightly after application for better uptake.
fertilizer_recommendations.summer_small_splits: During summer, use smaller split applications and avoid fertilizer broadcasting during peak afternoon heat.
fertilizer_recommendations.high_humidity: High humidity is present, so avoid excess nitrogen because it can increase soft growth and disease pressure.
fertilizer_recommendations.high_temperature: High temperature is present, so prefer evening or early morning fertilizer application with adequate irrigation.

pdf_print_ready: Print dialog opened. Choose Save as PDF.
